name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Margate, FL's Value Pawn & Jewelry at 602 S State Rd 7 buys and sells jewelry, electronics, and offers pawn loans.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry operates a standalone storefront at 602 S State Rd 7 in Margate, FL, serving the local community with pawn and sales services. This Margate shop specializes in jewelry, electronics, tools, and collectibles—buying, selling, and lending on items you need cash for. Monday through Friday, hours run 9 AM to 7 PM; Saturday 9 AM to 6 PM; Sunday noon to 5 PM.

Looking to pawn something, sell jewelry, or find secondhand electronics? The Margate location can help. Call 954-969-8010 to ask about current inventory, get item appraisals, or discuss loan terms before making the trip.

If you're a Margate resident needing quick cash, bring a valid ID and the item you're willing to part with. Value Pawn & Jewelry has helped Florida customers access fast funding and discover quality used goods for years.
pros: Same-day cash availability with no credit check required for pawn loans
Competitive gold and diamond buying with on-site precious metals testing for fair pricing
Significant retail markdowns (25-70% off) on brand-name pre-owned electronics, jewelry, and merchandise
Flexible payment options including layaway with only 10% down and third-party financing up to 12 months
EZ+ Rewards Program provides points on pawns, sales, and purchases with online account management
Daily new merchandise inventory with online shop and Instant Quote tool for remote electronics valuation
Jewelry VIP Program guarantees loan amounts and offers 100% trade-up credits on future jewelry purchases
cons: Interest rates, fees, and loan terms not disclosed on website—lack of upfront pricing transparency typical of pawn shops
Risk of losing pledged collateral if pawn loan is not repaid within agreed timeframe
Services and payment options are location-dependent; online payments unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania
Items sold are all pre-owned with no warranty or guarantee of long-term functionality despite protection plans available at additional cost
Pawn loans are short-term solutions that do not build credit history or help establish credit score
best_for: People needing immediate cash ($100-$5,000+) who have valuable items to pledge as collateral
Shoppers seeking steep discounts (25-70% off) on pre-owned brand-name electronics, jewelry, and merchandise
Gold and jewelry sellers looking for quick cash with transparent on-site valuation and testing
Budget-conscious consumers unable to access traditional credit who prefer layaway or payment-plan options
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for individuals with valuable collateral who need immediate cash without credit checks or those seeking steep discounts on pre-owned merchandise. The main caveat is that pawn loans are short-term solutions with forfeiture risk and do not build credit; borrowers should view them as emergency quick-cash options rather than traditional lending alternatives, and should review specific interest rates and terms in-store since pricing is not disclosed online.
services: Pawn loans against collateral with same-day funding
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with on-site precious metals testing
Retail sale of pre-owned electronics, jewelry, tools, fashion, gaming, and household items
Auto loans (specific terms not detailed on website)
Layaway purchases with 10% down and monthly payment options
Third-party flexible payment plans allowing 12+ months to pay
Online shop with daily new arrivals and remote browsing
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation
EZ+ Rewards Program with points tracking and online loan payment management
Jewelry VIP Protection Plan with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up credits
Product Protection Plans covering electronics and merchandise
meta_description: Value Pawn & Jewelry at 602 S State Rd 7, Margate, FL. Buy, sell, and pawn jewelry and electronics.
